name: array
title: Extended Array Functions
description: Additional array functions not available in the built-in set: min, max, avg, unique, indexOf

functions.name: min
functions.description: Returns the minimum numeric value in the array. array.min([3,1,4,1,5]) => 1

functions.name: max
functions.description: Returns the maximum numeric value in the array. array.max([3,1,4,1,5]) => 5

functions.name: avg
functions.description: Returns the arithmetic average of all numeric values in the array. array.avg([1,2,3,4,5]) => 3

functions.name: unique
functions.description: Returns a new array with duplicate values removed, preserving original order. array.unique([1,2,2,3,1]) => [1,2,3]

functions.name: indexOf
functions.description: Returns the zero-based index of the first occurrence of value in the array, or -1 if not found. array.indexOf(["a","b","c"], "b") => 1
